notes:
# BondoMod 0.1.49

- Fixed BondoMod staying invisible when an overlay was still running.
- Fixed reopening the mod after an update or a second launch.
- Improved the installer handoff so successful launches are no longer reported as failures.
- Fixed Custom Balls across the standard ball and rotating event-ball variants.
- Reworked Custom Match UI with the RLCS 2024 style, reliable match-only visibility and improved score/time tracking.
- Moved Custom Match UI into the Customes category.
- Improved Spotify album-cover recovery and caching.
